impact: The broader baseline diff treats MDI completed as an onboarding billing-ready target, but the Stripe active/past_due mirror guard only allows active billing when the MDI mirror is exactly billing_ready. If a case advances to completed after clinical unlock, later legitimate Stripe active/past_due webhooks may be ignored, leaving local billing mirror state stale. Reviewer marked this as broader/out-of-scope for T-024.
title: [out-of-scope / post-unlock billing mirror correctness] The broader baseline diff treats MDI completed as an onboarding billing-ready ta
